capabilities.name: Reorder rules (min/reorder point)
capabilities.notes: reorder_rules table has min_qty/max_qty/reorder_qty per product+location; ReorderMrpPanel manages them and procurement_run materializes suggestions into POs/MOs.

capabilities.name: Stock valuation (FIFO / weighted-average)
capabilities.verify: stock_valuation_layers + process_stock_move_valuation trigger (FIFO/average per product_category.costing_method) + COGS JE 4990/1460 + inventory_valuation_report skill (migration 20260611200000)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11 (avg/FIFO/shortfall/COGS JE/report exact); UI = InventoryValuationPanel tab + cost price in ProductDialog + costing_method on category (Lovable); engine + skill live on demo+www.

capabilities.name: Landed cost allocation (freight/duty)
capabilities.verify: landed_costs table + allocate_landed_cost RPC/skill (by_value|by_qty over receipt layers; Dt 1460/Cr 5710) (migration 20260611220000)
capabilities.notes: Stage-3 verified 2026-06-11: 25000 freight → layer 100000→125000, unit 12500, JE balanced, subsequent COGS uses landed cost. UI shipped 2026-06-12 (LandedCostPanel on received POs + history table w/ journal link). Dual-surface complete; consumed-qty restatement remains a documented v1 limit.

capabilities.name: Cycle counts / physical inventory variance
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: Stage-3 live over the MCP gateway on rzhj as an external agent — create → add_line (system_qty snapshot) → set_count(7) → post returned adjustments_applied=1 (variance applied via adjust_quant), get shows status=posted. UI: CycleCountPanel.tsx (new 'Cycle Count' tab in InventoryPage) + useInventoryCounts.ts hook drive the same manage_inventory_count RPC — new count, per-line counted-qty entry with color-coded variance, Post locks the count. Tables inventory_counts + inventory_count_lines; RPC manage_inventory_count (migration 20260614040000).
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-14 (scratch-Postgres); admin UI built + Stage-3 live-verified 2026-07-06 (commit 293104df). Both surfaces present.
